items.name_en: 🆕【Top Quality Replica】M12844 Yellow👏👏A card case finished in Monogram Maccasse (one of Mason's classic canvases). The effortless color accents are its charm. The top dyed denim leather strap and matching lining add an unexpected twist. Size: 11 x 7 x 1.5cm.🎁

items.name_en: 🆕【Top Quality】M12635 Embossed 👏👏A compact "Victor Wallet" updated with a "Quai d'Orsay" vibe, featuring a single-embossed shadow leather. Besides a zippered pocket, it includes practical interiors with bill and receipt pockets and five card slots. The flap closed by a "Louis Vuitton"-signed shutter button is also charming. Dimensions: 11.5 x 9 x 2.5.
